text: Walking through these glass doors into a space dedicated to research and development, I sense a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The wall speaks of showcasing innovation and exploring new interfaces between humans and machines. The spectacle of screens, text, and vibrant graphics inspires me to reflect on the ever-shifting boundary between knowledge and invention. I feel like a wanderer on the edge of possibility, drawn to contemplate how ideas come to life in these dedicated, thoughtfully designed spaces.
